name: inline_diff_render
description: S5.C inline-diff rendering. With write_file pre-seeded to auto-approve (tmp workspace default), prompts the LLM to create a small file. After the tool completes, the chat WebView should contain a red/green diff body. The script asserts both: (a) the file lands on disk; (b) the content shows up in the WebView DOM (the inline diff HTML is injected into the chat). Requires LM Studio at http://127.0.0.1:1234 with a tool-calling model.

args.text: Use the write_file tool to create greeting.txt with the exact contents 'hello-from-inline-diff'. One file, one line. Don't run it.
